title: Hornet Removal in New Rochelle, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in New Rochelle, Westchester. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving residential and commercial properties. Call today!
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets near your New Rochelle property? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout New Rochelle and the greater Westchester area. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from homes, businesses, and outdoor spaces, protecting your family and neighbors from dangerous stings.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving New Rochelle residents, we understand the unique pest challenges faced by properties near the Long Island Sound and along the city's tree-lined neighborhoods. Our certified technicians use proven removal methods and provide same-day service when you need it most, ensuring complete hornet elimination with transparent pricing from $350-$550.
localContext: From historic homes in the North End to waterfront properties along Echo Bay and commercial buildings downtown near Memorial Highway, New Rochelle's diverse architecture creates ideal nesting spots for hornets in eaves, attics, and trees. The city's abundant parks like Glen Island Park and mature landscaping throughout neighborhoods provide perfect environments where hornet populations can thrive, making professional removal essential for property safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout New Rochelle. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment within 24 hours in most cases. Emergency situations involving nests near entryways or high-traffic areas receive priority service to ensure your safety.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection to locate all nests, safe removal using professional-grade equipment and protective gear, complete nest elimination, treatment of the affected area to prevent return, and a follow-up inspection. The final price depends on nest location, size, and accessibility on your New Rochelle property.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family, pets, and property. Our technicians wear full protective equipment and establish safety perimeters during removal. We recommend keeping pets and children indoors during the treatment, and the area is completely safe within a few hours after service completion.

faqs.question: Do you service all neighborhoods in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide hornet removal services throughout all of New Rochelle, including the North End, downtown, Wykagyl, Forest Heights, Premium Point, and waterfront areas near Five Islands Park and Hudson Park. We're familiar with the specific pest challenges in each neighborhood and serve both residential and commercial properties across the city.
